name: Is carpal tunnel from my factory job compensable in Farmington?

mainEntity.name: Is carpal tunnel from my factory job compensable in Farmington?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, as occupational disease if repetitive work caused it; broad Utah coverage with medical proof.[1] Includes cumulative traumas.[1] Key factors: Link to job duties; report within 180 days; causation evidence.[1] Practical guidance: See specialist for diagnosis, document hours/tasks, file promptly. Common approved claim.
